flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Orange Technical College fell 56% between 2021 and 2024 (43.9% → 19.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Orange Technical College fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (67.5% → 58.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Orange Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (65.6% vs 77.7%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Orange Technical College are 36% above 6-year earnings ($27.0k → $36.6k).
